examples: This article describes design construction and characterization of a transistorized X-band ground-based scatterometer.
We introduce in this paper the Scatterometer mode of Multimode Microwave Sensors on board Chinese Shenzhou-4 unmanned spacecraft launched on Dec. 29, 2002.
This oscillator has been successfully used in solid state FM-CW radar system, microwave scatterometer, FM-jamming stations and frequency-agile local oscillator.
